title: Little Iack Horner
content:
Little Jack Horner sat in a corner,
    Eating a Christmas pie;
    He put in his thumb, and pulled out a plum,
    And said, "What a good boy am I!"
meaning:
"Little Iack Horner" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
